description: Legal document. In Hebrew. Location: Fustat/Cairo. Dated: Friday, 18 Tammuz 5319 AM, which is 23 June 1559 CE. Partnership in a muqāṭaʿa (Ottoman Turkish: mukata’a) between 2 Jews and a Gentile. This seems to be a formulary, as the Jews are named Reuven, Shimʿon, and Levi, and the Gentile is named "the Gentile." (Information in part from Avraham David via FGP.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
